name: 夹逼定理
subject: math
domain_name: Unit 1 极限与连续 Limits & Continuity
curriculum_points:
TOPIC 3.1 The Chain Rule
SUGGESTED SKILL
Implementing Mathematical Processes
1.C
Identify an appropriate mathematical rule or procedure based on the classification of a given expression (e.g., Use the chain rule to find the derivative of a composite function).

FUN-3.C FUN-3.C.1
Calculate derivatives of compositions of differentiable functions. The chain rule provides a way to differentiate composite functions.

FUN-3.C
Calculate derivatives of compositions of differentiable functions.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「夹逼定理」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
